items.title: France lead as Messi's Argentina miss top spot after Egypt scare: Where World Cup's final eight stand in FIFA rankings
items.summary: With the quarterfinals around the corner, here's how the eight remaining teams stack up in our latest FIFA World Cup power rankings.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Muzumdar urges India to 'stay in the present' after T20 World Cup malfunction
items.summary: The India head coach wants the team to "leave aside the disappointment" of the T20 World Cup and look ahead to the Test against England
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Idolises Ronaldo, plays like Saka - meet £40m Chelsea winger Quenda
items.summary: Chelsea's new signing Geovany Quenda hopes to follow in the footsteps of Cristiano Ronaldo by leaving Sporting's academy for the challenge and exposure of the Premier League.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
